Patient Technology at RCA Greenville — Live Demo

The actual patient screens, running live in your browser. Built in-house.

These are the real GRVTV screens patients see on the floor — not pictures. They rotate on their own and pull live data (today’s schedule, the wellness quiz, RCA news, weather, brand videos, and safety alerts).

Nursing StationLIVE

Welcome, live schedule + weather, Brain Break quiz, Meet Your Care Team, RCA news, a brand video, group reminders, and emergency alerts.

Open live screen ↗

CafeteriaLIVE

The shared dining-room screen — news, wellness quiz, Meet Your Care Team, weather, and recovery content.

Open live screen ↗

💡 Inside a screen: it cycles on its own, or use Next › / ‹ Prev (bottom corners) to move; ‹ Demo menu (top-left) brings you back.

About this demo: it opens to a sample Fresh Start unit and shows no patient information. This is a public demo link; everything here is what runs on the in-facility TVs.
